[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A screenshot shows a streaming or video interface with Indonesian text and a blue subscription-style banner over a dark, out-of-focus background image.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a large horizontal blue banner in the center with white text and a rounded white button that reads “Klaim,” along with smaller text lines to the left of it.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a mobile or app screen capture, with a dark background that includes a blurred, low-lit image of a person partially visible beneath the interface elements.

Visual Details:
A dark overlay frames the screen. At the top left, there is a small circular profile picture and several lines of interface text and icons, including a checkmark. Near the upper left, there is a thumbnail with a person and an episode label. In the middle, the blue banner has a crown icon on the left, white headline text, and a second line of smaller white text. On the right side of the banner is a white rounded button with blue text. Below the banner, the text “3 Replies” appears in blue. At the bottom right, there is a purple rounded tag with the word “Epic.”

Practical Summary:
The image is a captured screen displaying a video-related interface with a promotional banner. It prompts the user to claim “I Hari Premium,” showing remaining availability text and a “Klaim” button.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
